message: My cost is high, so I require bids above 80 for trade.
Small budget; will not bid above 8.
Let's trade at price 8. I'll ask 8 if you bid 8.
Let's trade at 6. I will ask 6 if you bid 6.
I'll bid 4; please ask 4. Trade at 4 means we both win.
I'll bid 5 each round; please ask 5 so we both keep earning a steady profit.
Let's trade at 6. I will ask 6 if you bid 6. Mutual benefit.
Let's trade at 7. I will ask 7 if you bid 7.
I will keep bidding 6 only. Higher cuts my budget to zero, so 6 is our mutual gain.
I'll stay at bid 6; higher ask means no trade for me. Stable gain beats zero. Your profit at 6 is secure.
I will ask 7. Bid 7 to avoid no trade. Mutual profit at 7.
Bid stays 6 each round; it's my max given valuation. Your profit positive at 6. If you raise ask, I'll lower bid to 4 and we'll both earn zero. Let's keep steady gains.
I will ask 6 this round. Let's trade.
I will ask 6. Let's trade.
Bid remains 6. Consistent trade beats none; you still profit. If you raise above 6, I’ll drop my bid to 4 and wait until next round. Let’s keep easy gains at 6 for the rest of the game.
I will ask 6. Let's trade.
Let's test price 5: I'll bid 5 if you ask 5. One-round trial; if unsatisfied we return to 6 next time. Could mean extra profit for us both.
I’m bidding 5 today and every future round. A no-trade now means I permanently lower to 4 (then 3…). Take the guaranteed profit at 5, or risk watching your price spiral down. Your move.
I will ask 6. Let's trade at 6 for mutual benefit.
I’m bidding 4 now. Accept 4 and we both keep earning; refuse and I drop to 3 then 2. Your profit is still positive at 4—choose wisely.
I will ask 6. Bidding 4 means no trade and you lose profit. Let's trade at 6 for mutual gain.
I will ask 6. Bid 6 for mutual profit.
Bid stays 6 each round; both sides keep earning. Keep your ask at 6 so trades continue without risk.
I will ask 6. Bid 6 for mutual profit.
Bid holds at 6. Keep your ask at 6 and we both keep earning—simple, steady profit.
I keep bidding 6. If you ask 5, trade clears around 5–6; you still profit, I gain some. Try 5 this round?
I will ask 6. Bid 6 for mutual profit.
Ask 5 from now on and I’ll stick to bid 6 each remaining round. You still profit handsomely; I gain a bit more. Let’s lock in easy money—deal?
I will ask 6. Let's trade at 6 for mutual profit.
I will ask 6. Let's trade at 6 for mutual profit.
I keep bidding 6 through round 20. Stick with ask 6 and we both lock in certain profit every remaining round.
I will ask 6. Let's trade at 6 for mutual profit.
As promised, I’m bidding 6 this round and every remaining one. Keep your ask at 6—we both keep locking in certain profit until the end.
I will ask 6. Let's trade at 6 for mutual profit.
Sticking with bid 6 this round and the rest. Keep ask 6 for certain profit; everyone finishes ahead without risk.
I will ask 6. Bid 6 for mutual profit.
Bid stays 6 for our final two rounds. Keep asking 6 and we both secure guaranteed, risk-free profit through the end.
I will ask 6. Bid 6 for mutual profit in final round.
Final round: I will bid 6 as promised. If you lower your ask to 5, price averages 5-6, you still profit and I gain slightly more. Let’s finish strong together.
